decisions.rationale: bTHzg requires four score inputs and orientation_score_number exists on user, but module-map ir_roots include no calculate_user_orientation API event—only bTHxW engine plus bTHxu/bTHyM/bTHyU. Gap is AC sourcing for orientation_score in API-02, not a missing item split. Add API-02 AC documenting orientation_score derivation from oq1_option_customer_orientation_answer_os or extend API-01 with calculateUserOrientation at implement prep.

DASH-07-crisis-onboarding-services-overlays is dashboard crisis/services UI with no IR or data coupling to pillar score aggregation. Spurious depends_on is scheduling graph polish—remove at implement prep; pipeline entry remains AUTH-05 completeOnboarding per API-01 AC-3.

bTIFU DatabaseTriggerEvent fires on modules_completed_count_number change per API-06 scope and AC-2; logically independent of API-05 ai_coaching_mode assignment. Drop API-05 from depends_on; keep PATHS-07-session-completion-route-integration and ENUM-03 only.

ir_refs correctly list entity id bTICV; ir/inventory.json confirms pointer /api/bTICa. Scope prose uses Bubble pointer name while ir_refs use entity id—inventory convention used elsewhere; implementers trace via ir_refs and criteria_audit.grounding passed.

API-01 AC-3 already documents onboardingProfilePipeline.runPillarScoreCalculators callable from AUTH-05 completeOnboarding.ts mirroring bTGNJ ScheduleAPIEvent chain. AUTH-05 decompose lacks reciprocal depends_on but consumer contract is documented on API side; add explicit API-01 AC-4 or AUTH implement kickoff note at implement wave.

summary: Review ok (90% readiness, 0 blockers). 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 1 accept. Advance decompose for final module MOD-DRSAM-API and complete all 11 modules: clarify orientation_score sourcing in API-02 at implement prep, remove spurious API-01→DASH-07 and API-06→API-05 depends_on, add AUTH↔API pipeline AC at implement kickoff.
